title: AURORA, Official Merchandise, 61616, The Mouse Palm Pals, Soft Toy, Golden brown
features: Step into the heartwarming world of The Gruffalo with our enchanting Mouse Palm Pals Soft Toy, inspired by the best-selling children's picture book The Gruffalo written by Julia Donaldson and illustrated by Axel Scheffler. This is a golden brown-coloured cute and cuddly mouse plush, filled with beans that perfectly fit into your palm. Great for a little cuddling!

100% Official Licensed Merchandise. Aurora World brings the magical world of The Gruffalo to life with our range of The Gruffalo soft toys, featuring beloved characters such as The Gruffalo, Fox, Owl and Snake. Suitable from Birth. The Mouse Palm Pals measures 13cm

This adorable mouse plush toy is a perfect gift for any occasion. With its soft, plush body and golden-brown colour with a white tummy area, it's sure to be a hit with fans of The Gruffalo, no matter their age. Whether you're shopping for Christmas, a birthday, or just a general gift, this mouse plush is an ideal choice.

Palm Pals are soft and extremely touchable toys made with high-quality materials. The Mouse Palm Pals is part of our Eco-Friendly initiative and comes with inner fibre fill and beans made from recycled plastic materials. Our hangtags are recyclable with our cloth labels being made from recycled materials.

As an industry leader for over 40 years, Aurora World is committed to designing and manufacturing innovative and high-quality plush products, and this charming soft toy is no exception. Get your hands on this delightful soft toy and experience the joy of this beloved Palm Pals.
description: Product Description Introducing The Mouse Palm Pals - a soft and cuddly mouse plush based on the beloved mouse character from the best-selling children's picture book, The Gruffalo, written by Julia Donaldson and illustrated by Axel Scheffler. This golden brown-coloured plush toy is filled with beans that fit perfectly in your palm, making it great for cuddling. Palm Pals are made with high-quality materials and are extremely touchable. We are proud to say that The Mouse Palm Pals is part of our Eco-Friendly initiative and comes with inner fibre fill and beans made from recycled plastic materials. Our hangtags are recyclable, and our cloth labels are made from recycled materials as well. This soft toy is suitable for all ages and measures 13cm. Whether you're looking for a gift for Christmas, a birthday, or any other occasion, The Mouse Palm Pals is an excellent choice. This adorable golden-brown coloured mouse plush with a white tummy area is sure to win everyone's heart. Made from high-quality materials, this soft toy has a super-soft plush body, making it an ideal gift choice for fans of The Gruffalo of all ages. As an industry leader for over 40 years, Aurora World is committed to designing and manufacturing innovative and high-quality plush products, and this charming soft toy is no exception. Get your hands on The Mouse Palm Pals and experience the joy of this beloved character. Safety Warning Suitable from Birth
